ocr.text: In the competitive landscape of the Asia-Pacific media and entertainment sector, user engagement metrics play a crucial role in
assessing the performance and growth potential of platforms like Spotify. The Q3 2023 data indicates varied engagement levels
across the region, with an overall Engagement Index of 75, reflecting the platform's ability to connect with its user base
effectively.
UserEngagementMetrics  PlatformPerformance  UserDemographics  TotalUsers  MonthlyActiveUsers  GrowthRate
Region  Q32023  Change(%)  AverageListeningTime  RetentionRate  NewSubscribers  ChurnRate  NetPromoterScore  UserFeedback  EngagementIndex
Asia-Pacific  5M  2.5%  45min/user  85%  500K  10%  60  Positive  [HIDDEN]
Japan  2M  [HIDDEN]  50min/user  82%  [HIDDEN]  8%  65  Neutral  70
Australia  1.5M  1.8%  40min/user  88%  150K  6%  [HIDDEN]  Positive  80
India  3M  4.5%  55min/user  75%  300K  [HIDDEN]  80  [HIDDEN]  85
SouthKorea  [HIDDEN]  2.2%  48min/user  81%  120K  9%  68  Neutral  72
Singapore  900K  3.5%  53min/user  87%  90K  5%  74  Positive  78
NewZealand  700K  2.0%  45min/user  83%  70K  4%  73  Neutral  76
Philippines  1M  3.8%  60min/user  [HIDDEN]  110K  7%  77  Positive  79
Indonesia  2.5M  5.0%  70min/user  76%  250K  11%  82  Positive  84
Thailand  850K  2.7%  52min/user  80%  100K  6%  71  Neutral  74
Notably, Australia achieved a commendable Net Promoter Score of 70, suggesting high levels of customer satisfaction and
loyalty, which are essential for long-term retention. In the Philippines, the Retention Rate stands at an impressive 78%,
underscoring the effectiveness of engagement strategies tailored to local preferences. Meanwhile, Japan experienced a Change
of 3.0% in user engagement metrics, indicating a steady growth trajectory, bolstered by the addition of 200K New Subscribers
in this quarter. Conversely, India's Churn Rate of 12% raises concerns about retaining users in this burgeoning market.
However, the User Feedback from India remains predominantly Positive, suggesting that while churn exists, the overall
sentiment toward the service is favorable. In South Korea, the user base reached 1.8M, reflecting the region's increasing
adoption of digital streaming platforms. This comprehensive overview of user engagement metrics provides critical insights for
stakeholders aiming to enhance their strategies across the diverse Asia-Pacific markets.
